creator: daviewales
ingredients_text: _Hoki_ fillet pieces (50%), gluten free crumb (50%) [rice flour, maize flour, vegetable oils, water, tapioca starch, maize starch, rice bran, thickener (1404), salt, acidity regulators (500, 450, 541), stabilisers (415, 412), maltodextrin, yeast, garlic powder, onion powder]. Contains _fish_.
